title: Throughline accessibility-tree node
description: One node in the accessibility tree fed to the description engine. Required for OVERVIEW / SCREEN / ELEMENT modes; OPTIONAL for SCREENSHOT mode (the host MAY provide a synthetic stub to carry caller context, but it is not used by the SCREENSHOT prompt template).

id.description: A stable identifier for this node. Used as the conversation LRU key. In the web reference impl this is the Figma node id; in the macOS impl it is the sha256 of the captured PNG bytes.

name.description: Human-readable name. Quoted verbatim into the opening user message; control characters and double-quotes SHOULD be sanitized by the caller.

role.description: Semantic role. The web reference impl uses one of: page, heading, text, button, image, group, graphic. Implementations MAY extend the vocabulary as needed; the role string is interpolated into the prompt as-is.

children.description: Children of this node. Only the first two levels of children are rendered into the prompt outline; deeper levels are dropped.
